Employment Application

This form has been modified since it was saved. Please review all fields before submitting.

* indicates a required field

  7. Applicant Data
  26. If you are under 18 and we require a work permit, can you furnish one?
  30. Have you ever worked for the City of Tuttle?*
  33. Do you have a relative who works for the City of Tuttle or is on the City Council?*
  36. Are you a citizen of the United States?*
  39. Type of employment desired*
  41. Have you ever pled "guilty" or "no contest" to or been convicted of a crime?*
  45. Education
  63. References
  85. Emergency Contact
  95. Previous Employment (begin with most recent)
  100. Date of Employment
  101. —
  119. May we contact this employer for reference?
  124. Date of Employment
  125. —
  143. May we contact this employer for reference?
  148. Date of Employment
  149. —
  167. May we contact this employer for reference?*
  169. Signature
  171. I certify that my answers are true and complete to the best of my knowledge. I authorize you to make such investigation and inquiries of my personal, employment, educational, financial, or medical history and other related matters as may be necessary for an employment decision. I hereby release employers, schools or persons from all liability in responding to inquiries in connection with my application.
  173. In the event I am employed, I understand that false or misleading information given in my application or interview(s) may result in discharge.
    177. Leave This Blank:

  178. This field is not part of the form submission.

  179. Submit Submit and Print
